name: Kiss Kiss Sxx
overview:
“Kiss Kiss Sxx” — Eight Kisses, Eight Stories of Love

“Kiss Kiss Sxx” is a BL omnibus drama project featuring eight brand-new BL stories, each planned, written, and directed by emerging filmmakers.  Eight completely different worlds come together to form one beautiful omnibus.

trailers.title: Kiss Kiss Sxx Trailer BL Series 키스키스X스
